body:
transgenderballofanxiety:

no actually bc trans women do have periods. and actually fuck you i do want to bleed every month

The first few times I had mine, it was super duper affirming. And as it kept happening, it shifted to “FUCK THIS SHIT!”

That said, given I can’t seem to get it to stop without taking steps I’m unwilling to take. (They can pry my hormones from my cold dead hands, I have a stockpile if they decide to try, and I’ve ordered from overseas before.) Actually having the blood would be nice just so, I don’t go through the routine every time of, “Did I eat something I shouldn’t have?”, “Am I sick?”, etc, before finally realizing what is going on.

trail.content_raw: no actually bc trans women do have periods. and actually fuck you i do want to bleed every month
trail.content: no actually bc trans women do have periods. and actually fuck you i do want to bleed every month
